principle: Do not equate valid JSON, recognized containers, source-lane presence, or UI availability with trusted biblical text.

notes: Currently named canonical NT defects are repaired or overlay-represented without main-row insertion.

reasons: Ordinary canonical OT non-Psalms chapter/verse completeness audit passed for 38 books and 779 chapters with zero findings.

latest_canonical_ot_final_trust_audit.summary: Canonical OT non-Psalms final trust readiness passed after ordinary OT completeness, recovery consolidation, trust boundary, Daniel 11 governed source-absent exclusion, and Nehemiah 7:73 adapter policy checks. This is not a whole-Bible or whole-OT-with-Psalms trust claim.

latest_nehemiah_7_73_adapter_policy.summary: Nehemiah 7:73 is not a missing-row defect. NRSV/Rotherham/KJV active row 7:73 contains both the settlement close and the seventh-month transition. NABRE places the settlement close at 7:72 and the seventh-month transition at 8:1. Preserve source text by source address; any harmonized display requires adapter/view policy rather than synthetic row construction.

latest_daniel_11_source_absent_policy.summary: The preserved controlled NABRE source lane at commit d0eed049 contains Daniel chapter 11 with an empty verses array. Daniel 11:1-45 remains without NABRE active text by governed exclusion. Do not synthesize NABRE, scrape substitute text, or overlay from another translation. Canonical OT may proceed only to final trust audit with this exclusion recorded.

latest_maccabees_3_4_source_state.summary: Current active 3 and 4 Maccabees files already carry NRSV source-backed repair metadata from BibleGateway NRSVA and the historical repair commit 8177b52. Raw source acquisition is no longer the next blocker for these files; further work is bounded source/form review and known-gap policy.

latest_maccabees_4_variant_footnote_poli.summary: BibleGateway NRSVA presents 4 Maccabees 10:4 and 11:7-8 as other-authority footnote additions, not primary body-text rows. They remain governed variant material and must not be inserted into active rows without a separate variant apparatus policy.

latest_greek_daniel_form_policy.summary: Active Greek Daniel is governed as one NRSV extended Daniel book: Daniel 1-12, Prayer of Azariah/Song embedded in chapter 3, Susanna as chapter 13, and Bel and the Dragon as chapter 14. DRB/NABRE row-grid deltas are not repair instructions.

blockers: Deuterocanon governance explicitly remains not trusted/underbuilt after prior tranches.
Greek Esther requires manual Catholic/Greek Esther form and versification review before any repair.
Greek Daniel requires manual form and versification policy before any repair.
4 Maccabees 10:4 and 11:7-8 are governed variant-footnote material, not active primary rows.
Greek Esther simple overlay remains blocked.
Greek Daniel simple overlay remains blocked.
4 Maccabees variant-footnote insertion remains blocked without a variant apparatus policy.
Broader canon raw corpus is governed but remains not trusted.
Broader canon governance audit found 38 candidate records.
Broader canon governance audit found 36 raw-text-only records.
Broader canon governance audit found 2 zero-row records.
Broader canon material has not received source-family and translation-lane adjudication.
Broader canon material has not received final textual collation sufficient for a trust claim.

latest_active_non_vulgate_trust_boundary.summary: Active non-Vulgate trust boundary is explicit after Psalter source-governance completion. Canonical NT, canonical OT non-Psalms, and Psalms have bounded trust/source-governance status. Deuterocanon, broader canon, and Vulgate remain non-trusted or deferred. Whole-corpus and whole-OT trust remain blocked.

blockers: Psalms legacy subsystem is shape-governed but remains textually not trusted.
Psalm records contain only id and text keys, with no row-level source or provenance fields.
Psalm records contain no explicit translation-lane metadata outside text-object keys.
Existing Psalm audits prove count and shape integrity, not source provenance.
The NRSV Psalms key is not promoted as a trusted Bible NRSV lane.
Grail1963 remains a liturgical psalter lane with separate conventions.
Psalms 151-155 remain Orthodox appendix material, not normal canonical OT chapter rows.

latest_deuterocanon_policy_closed_not_tr.summary: Deuterocanon remaining lanes are governed and policy-closed for the current active corpus, but the lane remains not textually trusted. Greek Esther and Greek Daniel preserve active NRSV addition forms; 3/4 Maccabees source-backed repair state is governed; 4 Maccabees variant-footnote gaps remain governed non-primary rows.

latest_broader_canon_policy_closed_not_t.summary: Broader canon source-adjudication is policy-closed for the current active corpus, but the lane remains not textually trusted. The raw corpus is governed, with 38 candidate records, 36 raw-text-only records, and 2 zero-row records. No Bible text mutation was performed.

latest_final_active_non_vulgate_boundary.summary: Psalter expected-lane source governance is complete. Active non-Vulgate corpus remains bounded, not globally trusted. Whole-corpus trust remains blocked by deuterocanon, broader canon, and Vulgate deferral.
